HGSS.473.0000:
Hello, there!
I am the official Name Rater!\f
Want me to rate the nicknames
of your Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.473.0001:
Which Pokémon nickname should
I critique, kid?
HGSS.473.0002:
[0101,0000,0000], is it?
That is a decent nickname!\f
But, would you like me to give it
a much better name?\r
How about it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.473.0003:
All right! Then, what shall the new
nickname be?\f
HGSS.473.0004:
There! From now on, this Pokémon
shall be known as [0101,0000,0000]!\f
It is a much better name than before!
Don’t you agree?
HGSS.473.0005:
OK.
Suit yourself.\f
Do come visit again if you’ve changed
your mind.
HGSS.473.0006:
There! From now on, this Pokémon
shall be known as [0101,0000,0000]!\f
Not so different from before?
Your eyes are tricking you!\f
This one is better.
How fortunate for you!
HGSS.473.0007:
Hmm.
[0101,0000,0000], is it?\f
That is a truly impeccable name!\f
Take good care of [0101,0000,0000]!
HGSS.473.0008:
Huh...
That is merely an Egg!
